title: pelargonium × potteri
intro: Pelargonium × pottersii, also known as Rose Geranium or Barberton Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the Geraniaceae family, characterized by its fragrant flowers and attractive foliage. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat digestive issues, anxiety, and insomnia due to its antispasmodic and antidepressant properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium × pottersii include its ability to alleviate symptoms of menopause, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote a good night's sleep. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve distillation or infusion of the leaves to produce essential oils or teas that are used in aromatherapy and herbal remedies.
